name: hyperbrief
description: Decision-delegation gating discipline. Wraps Hyperbrief.md v0.1 as model-invoked skills: trigger rubric + §0 escalation gate + 8-section JSON IR schema + deterministic MD/HTML renderers + Constellation DECISION_REQUEST card integration + revisit-date learning loop closure. Phase 1 = skills (trigger-check + hyperbrief + revisit) + IR schema + 2 deterministic renderers + 2 templates. Phase 2 will add PreToolUse hook (decision-keyword detection auto-triggers rubric) + MCP server (hyperbrief_render / hyperbrief_validate / decision_ledger_append / decision_ledger_query). 결정 위임 게이팅 규율: 사용자에게 결정을 묻는 행위 자체를 규율한다.
